item.title: Charter’s stock just got hammered. Here’s what fueled its worst day on record.
item.description: Charter lost more internet subscribers than expected in the latest quarter, signaling that the company isn’t out of the woods when it comes to broadba...

item.title: ‘My child requires lifelong support’: I’m in my 40s with $330,000 for retirement. How can I make this last both our lifetimes?
item.description: “The portfolio has grown, but I can’t help feeling that it hasn’t grown as much as it could have.”

item.title: Why crude prices won’t fall back to levels seen before the Iran war anytime soon
item.description: SLB and Halliburton both said this week they expect crude prices to remain higher for longer. That will have immediate implications for a host of prod...

item.title: Nvidia’s stock heads for first record close in 6 months — thanks to Intel
item.description: Nvidia is finally on track to finish back in $5 trillion territory, capping off an “incredible week” for chip makers.

item.title: After suspicious Polymarket bets, French weather forecast office files police complaint
item.description: Temperature readings at Charles de Gaulle International Airport rose by a few degrees in a matter of minutes.
